scope: repo-X governance tree-wide mutation safety latch
summary: Ticket-specific context pack for a governance-tooling safety latch. No business-domain rules govern the implementation; the active constraints are the COORD-362 prompt and governance single-writer safety policy.

items.statement: Tree-wide governance mutations must fail closed when a live foreign doing lock and dirty non-derived paths coexist.
Governed writers must preserve single-writer safety and avoid destructive shared-checkout mutations.
